label: Act of Faith
description: The inward believing act by which the intellect assents to divine truth.

label: Almsgiving
description: Giving to the needy as an act of mercy and, through mercy, of charity.

label: Apostasy
description: Backsliding from God, and absolutely speaking, withdrawal from the faith.

label: Article of Faith
description: Distinct doctrinal articulation within the content of faith.

label: Beatitude of the Clean of Heart
description: Beatitude pronounced on the clean of heart.

label: Beatitude of Those Who Mourn
description: Beatitude pronounced on those who mourn.

label: Beatitude of the Peacemakers
description: Beatitude pronounced on the peacemakers.

label: Beatitude of the Poor in Spirit
description: Beatitude pronounced on the poor in spirit.

label: Beneficence
description: Doing good to another as an act of friendship and charity.

label: Blasphemy
description: Disparagement of divine goodness by denying what befits God or affirming what does not.

label: Sin Against the Holy Spirit
description: The special sin against the Holy Spirit as treated in questions 14-15.

label: Blindness of Mind
description: Privation of intellectual sight by willful turning away from intelligible principle.

label: Charity
description: Theological virtue of friendship with God.
notes: Do not auto-normalize bare 'love' to charity outside clearly theological context.

label: Common Good
description: Good of the whole community rather than of a private individual alone.

label: Concord
description: Agreement of hearts directed together by charity.

label: Confession of Faith
description: The outward verbal confession of what is held by faith.

label: Contention
description: Contrariety of speech in a disordered or truth-disclaiming manner.

label: Despair (Sin)
description: Sinful movement contrary to hope by judging pardon or salvation unavailable from God.

label: Discord
description: Dissent of wills contrary to the concord produced by charity.

label: Dullness of Sense
description: Obtuseness of intellectual penetration in spiritual matters.

label: Ecclesial Unity
description: The unity of the Church and its members described as an effect of charity.

label: Envy
description: Grief over a neighbor's good in a way contrary to charity.

label: Eternal Life
description: Supernatural end exceeding the proportion of human nature.

label: Faith
description: Theological virtue assenting to divine truth on God's authority.

label: Gift of Fear of the Lord
description: Gift of the Holy Spirit producing reverential fear before God.

label: First Truth
description: Formal object of faith considered under divine revelation.

label: Folly
description: Dulled judgment in divine things, treated as contrary to wisdom.

label: Form of the Virtues
description: The ordering role by which charity informs the acts of the virtues.

label: Fraternal Correction
description: Correction of a brother's sin as an act of charity ordered to amendment.

label: Friendship with God
description: The definitional friendship Aquinas attributes to charity.

label: God
description: God as the object or term of theological virtue and charity.

label: Hatred (Sin)
description: Sinful hatred opposed to the love due to God or neighbor.

label: Heresy
description: Species of unbelief choosing private judgment against Christian doctrine.

label: Holy Spirit
description: The Holy Spirit in relation to infused charity and the named gifts.

label: Hope
description: The theological virtue by which eternal beatitude is expected from God.

label: Joy
description: Spiritual joy in God proceeding from charity.

label: Gift of Knowledge
description: Gift of the Holy Spirit for judging created things in relation to God.

label: Love (Act)
description: The principal act belonging to charity inasmuch as charity loves.

label: Mercy
description: Merciful movement or act as treated in the charity tract.

label: Neighbor
description: Neighbor as the human object loved out of charity in God.

label: Object of Faith
description: Formal and material object considered in the tract on faith.

label: Peace
description: The ordered tranquility and union effected by charity.

label: Precepts of Charity
description: Precepts whose end and ordering belong to charity.

label: Precepts of Faith, Knowledge, and Understanding
description: Precept material governing faith together with the connected gifts of knowledge and understanding.

label: Precepts of Hope and Fear
description: Precepts or legal preambles ordering the acts of hope and fear.

label: Presumption
description: Immoderate hope relying on God or self in a disordered way.

label: Scandal
description: Something less rightly done or said that occasions another's spiritual downfall.

label: Schism
description: Scission from ecclesial unity, directly opposed to the unity effected by charity.

label: Sedition
description: Tumult or antagonism between parts of one people, opposed to civic unity and peace.

label: Sloth
description: Oppressive sorrow about spiritual good, contrary to charity's joy.

label: Strife
description: Private war or contradiction of deeds between persons.

label: Symbol of Faith
description: Collected formula by which the truths of faith are proposed.

label: Unbelief
description: Sin opposed to faith by refusing or despising what faith proposes.

label: Gift of Understanding
description: Gift of the Holy Spirit granting penetration into divine truth.

label: Virtue
description: Generic virtue as good operative perfection.
notes: Do not collapse generic virtue into a specific virtue without explicit passage support.

label: War
description: War as treated in the charity tract under the conditions of justice and peace.

label: Will
description: The rational appetite and proximate principle of commanded human action.

label: Gift of Wisdom
description: Gift of the Holy Spirit perfecting higher judgment by divine things.
